deliverable.description: must be 'resource-optimization-plan REVISION-1 honesty ruling RC-1..RC-8'

preregistration_preserved.description: true iff the REVISED ruling keeps confirmatory claims free of already-seen-data influence

summary.description: 3-5 sentence bottom line for the maintainer: is it ratifiable?

amendment_closure.description: one entry per amendment 1..6 (1=RC-7 comparator, 2=RC-8 f7 survivor, 3=RC-5, 4=D9/kot-reg-2, 5=reuse-check --gate, 6=ASM-0010/0011)

amendment.description: e.g. '1 RC-7 comparator', '2 RC-8 f7 survivor'

enforcing_ref.description: the code/prose that enforces closure (file:symbol or doc §)

new_loopholes.description: loopholes INTRODUCED by revision-1 (empty if none)

judgment_calls.description: assessment of the designer's flagged judgment calls (a)-(e)

consumption_fail_closed.description: true iff all consumption paths refuse today (no ratification file)

sig_voids_on_doc_edit.description: true iff editing the ruling doc voids a ratification signature (sha binding)

remaining_amendments.description: concrete edits still required before ratification (empty iff overall_verdict == CONFIRM)

reasoning.description: audit trail: files read, refusal paths traced, why the verdict
